verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Touch me again, Lord, I need your power, I need your strength in this trying hour, You said if I′d ask I would surely receive, So touch me again, Lord, that's what I need,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Touch me again, Lord, Touch me again, Lord, Let your manna fall from on high Wherever I′m going, you've already been, So I ask you to touch me again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Touch me again, Lord, I see that mountain, Touch me again, Lord, let me feel that fountain, Come, Holy Spirit, let the Heaven's descend, And touch me again, Lord, Touch me again.
